Accommodation in Bilene

Peaceful, by the lagoon

We have partnerships with the 3 establishments offered, do not hesitate to contact us for availability and reservations

The Palmeiras

This is where our kite center is located, a traditional all-comfort small resort, with its beach bar and restaurant on the beach, where you can enjoy a "2M" (the local beer) while watching riders on the water. They offer bungalows close to the sea, or shared houses, directly on the beach. As an indication, prices are around 50€ / night / bungalow.

The San Martinho

Located 500m from our kite center, on the same beach, the San Martinho is the highest standing alternative on the lagoon. It offers hotel rooms or comfortable houses to share, up to 4 bedrooms. It is carefully maintained, has several pools, a quality restaurant and beach bar. As an indication, prices are around 120€ / night / room. San Martinho website

The Sunset

It's a bit of a compromise between our previous choices, located 800m from the kite center, on the same beach, the Sunset is a small peaceful hotel with its quality restaurant (we often go there for dinner), well-kept rooms, an intermediate standing between the Palmeiras and the San Martinho. As an indication, prices are around 120€ / night / room.

Mail : contact@bilenekite.com
Air Tricks prod 2022
